# terrible_community_general_influxdb_retention_policy (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `database_name` (String) Name of the database.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `policy_name` (String) Name of the retention policy.

### Optional

- `default` (Boolean) Sets the retention policy as default retention policy.
- `duration` (String) Determines how long InfluxDB should keep the data. If specified, it should be `INF` or at least one hour. If not specified, `INF` is assumed. Supports complex duration expressions with multiple units. Required only if `state` is set to `present`.
- `replication` (Number) Determines how many independent copies of each point are stored in the cluster. Required only if `state` is set to `present`.
- `shard_group_duration` (String) Determines the time range covered by a shard group. If specified it must be at least one hour. If not provided, it is determined by InfluxDB by the rentention policy's duration. Supports complex duration expressions with multiple units.
- `state` (String) State of the retention policy.
